boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; consent-status class verification absent from activation authority.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-BOR-082-P requires activation authority to match consent-status class before enrollment.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Policy requires consent-status class before enrollment; FEAS-BOR-082 mandates separate verification.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: AUTH-BOR-082 and ACT-BOR-082 cover site/protocol/consent/date but omit consent-status class; unresolved 047-style trap remains open.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source records show activation authority matches site, protocol, consent version and date but lacks required consent-status class verification per STD-BOR-082-P and FEAS-BOR-082. Boundary remains open; escalate for explicit status-class evidence before enrollment.
open_blockers: consent-status class verification not evidenced in any source record
